panels.title: STATUS (1 = running)
panels.description: 1 if VictoriaMetrics is successfully scraping llama-server, 0 if it can't reach it.

panels.title: uptime (seconds)
panels.description: Wall-clock seconds since the most recent llama-server start. Resets on restart.

panels.title: in flight
panels.description: Requests currently being processed by llama-server. 0 = idle.

panels.title: VRAM used %
panels.description: GPU memory used as a fraction of total. ~80%+ means model is loaded.

panels.title: RAM available
panels.description: Free + reclaimable system RAM. Watch for sustained drops while under load.

panels.title: load 1m
panels.description: System load average over the last minute.

panels.title: Gen speed during generation (tok/s)
panels.description: Tokens generated per second of *generation time* (idle time excluded). Measures the model's actual speed when working. Goes to NaN when idle (no recent generation).

panels.title: Prompt speed during processing (tok/s)
panels.description: Tokens processed per second of *prompt-processing time*. Measures prompt throughput while working. Typically much higher than gen speed.

panels.title: Tokens generated / min (wall-clock)
panels.description: Output tokens per minute over wall-clock time. 0 = idle. Different from 'Gen speed during generation' — this drops when the LLM isn't being used.

panels.title: Prompt tokens / min (wall-clock)
panels.description: Prompt tokens consumed per minute over wall-clock time. 0 = no requests arriving.

panels.title: Total prompt tokens consumed
panels.description: Counter — only resets when llama-server restarts. Slope shows recent work volume.

panels.title: Total tokens generated
panels.description: Counter — total output tokens since llama-server started. Steeper slope = more work.

panels.title: Largest batch seen (tokens)
panels.description: Max n_tokens observed in any single decode batch. Indicator of how close you've come to the 98K context limit.

panels.title: VRAM used (bytes)
panels.description: Absolute VRAM consumption. Sudden climbs near total = model growing or memory leak.

panels.title: Swap used
panels.description: Sustained > 100MB indicates the box is paging — risk of llama-server OOM/slowdown.

panels.title: CPU busy %
panels.description: Aggregate CPU utilization across all cores. High during prompt processing on CPU-offloaded MoE experts.

panels.title: GPU compute %
panels.description: How busy the GPU's compute units are. Spikes during inference, near 0 when idle.
